heading: Duties of Secretary under Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act
label: 20301a Duties of Secretary under Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act
notes: References in TextThe Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 99–410100 Stat. 924Aug. 28, 1986

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021, and not as part of title I of the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act which comprises this chapter.
amendments: References in TextThe Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 99–410100 Stat. 924Aug. 28, 1986

children.heading: Ensuring ability of absent uniformed services voters serving at diplomatic and consular posts to receive and transmit balloting materials
children.label: a Ensuring ability of absent uniformed services voters serving at diplomatic and consular posts to receive and transmit balloting materials
children.text: In carrying out the Secretary’s duties as the Presidential designee under the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act ( et seq.), the Secretary shall take such actions as may be necessary, feasible, and practical to ensure that a uniformed services voter under such Act who is absent from the United States by reason of active duty or service at a diplomatic and consular post of the United States is able to receive and transmit balloting materials in the same manner and with the same rights and protections as a uniformed services voter under such Act who is absent from the United States by reason of active duty or service at a military installation.52 U.S.C. 20301

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to elections held on or after .January 1, 2021
